---
title: "06 — Treatment Panel: Coughlin Exposure"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/_config.R")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/R/helpers.R")
```

## Load RF-scored articles

```{r load}
library(arrow)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

rf_scored_dir <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, "rf_scored")
scored_files <- list.files(rf_scored_dir, pattern = "\\.parquet$", full.names = TRUE)
message("Found ", length(scored_files), " scored year files")

# Load all scored articles
dt <- rbindlist(lapply(scored_files, read_parquet), fill = TRUE)
message("Total articles: ", nrow(dt))
```

## Identify Coughlin-related articles

```{r coughlin-flag}
coughlin_pattern <- regex(
  paste0("\\b(",
         paste(c("coughlin", "father coughlin",
                 "social justice",  # his publication
                 "national union for social justice",
                 "union party"),
               collapse = "|"),
         ")\\b"),
  ignore_case = TRUE
)

# We need the article text for this — reload from scored data
scored_dir_text <- file.path(DATA_PARQUET, "articles_scored")
scored_text_files <- list.files(scored_dir_text, pattern = "\\.parquet$",
                                full.names = TRUE)

# Process year by year to flag Coughlin mentions
message("Flagging Coughlin mentions...")
coughlin_flags <- list()

for (sf in scored_text_files) {
  yr <- gsub(".*scored_(\\d{4})\\.parquet", "\\1", sf)
  dt_yr <- as.data.table(read_parquet(sf, col_select = c("article_id", "article")))
  dt_yr[, is_coughlin := as.integer(str_detect(tolower(article), coughlin_pattern))]
  coughlin_flags[[yr]] <- dt_yr[, .(article_id, is_coughlin)]
  rm(dt_yr)
}

coughlin_df <- rbindlist(coughlin_flags)
message("Coughlin-mentioning articles: ", sum(coughlin_df$is_coughlin))

# Merge flag into main data
dt <- merge(dt, coughlin_df, by = "article_id", all.x = TRUE)
dt[is.na(is_coughlin), is_coughlin := 0L]
```

## Build newspaper × month panel

```{r panel}
# Parse year_month to date for ordering
dt[, ym_date := as.Date(paste0(year_month, "-01"))]
dt[, time_id := as.integer(difftime(ym_date, as.Date("1774-01-01"), units = "days") / 30)]

# Newspaper-month panel
panel <- dt[, .(
  # Outcomes: incivility excluding Coughlin articles
  incivil_rate_rf = mean(p_incivil[is_coughlin == 0], na.rm = TRUE),
  incivil_rate_lexicon = mean(uncivil_score[is_coughlin == 0], na.rm = TRUE),

  # Coughlin exposure measures
  coughlin_count = sum(is_coughlin),
  coughlin_share = mean(is_coughlin),
  coughlin_front_page = sum(is_coughlin * front_page, na.rm = TRUE),

  # Controls
  n_articles = .N,
  n_articles_non_coughlin = sum(is_coughlin == 0),
  mean_words = mean(n_words, na.rm = TRUE),
  mean_ocr = mean(ocr_quality, na.rm = TRUE),
  front_page_share = mean(front_page, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = .(newspaper_name, year_month, ym_date, time_id)]

# Sort
setorder(panel, newspaper_name, ym_date)

message("Panel dimensions: ", nrow(panel), " newspaper-months")
message("Unique newspapers: ", uniqueN(panel$newspaper_name))
message("Time range: ", min(panel$ym_date), " to ", max(panel$ym_date))
```

## Define treatment: sustained Coughlin coverage

```{r treatment}
# A newspaper is "treated" if it has sustained Coughlin coverage:
# >= 2 Coughlin articles in >= 2 of 3 consecutive months

panel[, sustained := {
  n <- .N
  flag <- rep(0L, n)
  if (n >= 3) {
    for (i in 1:(n - 2)) {
      months_with <- sum(coughlin_count[i:(i+2)] >= 2)
      if (months_with >= 2) {
        flag[i] <- 1L
        break  # first occurrence
      }
    }
  }
  flag
}, by = newspaper_name]

# Treatment date = first month of sustained coverage
treat_info <- panel[sustained == 1,
                    .(treat_date = min(ym_date), treat_time_id = min(time_id)),
                    by = newspaper_name]

panel <- merge(panel, treat_info, by = "newspaper_name", all.x = TRUE)

# Binary treatment indicator: 1 if after treatment date
panel[, treated := as.integer(!is.na(treat_date) & ym_date >= treat_date)]
panel[is.na(treated), treated := 0L]

# Treatment cohort (for fect)
panel[, treat_cohort := fifelse(!is.na(treat_time_id), treat_time_id, 0L)]

# Numeric newspaper ID
panel[, newspaper_id := as.integer(factor(newspaper_name))]

message("\nTreatment summary:")
message("  Treated newspapers: ", uniqueN(panel[treated == 1, newspaper_name]))
message("  Never-treated newspapers: ",
        uniqueN(panel[is.na(treat_date), newspaper_name]))
message("  Treated newspaper-months: ", sum(panel$treated))
message("  Control newspaper-months: ", sum(panel$treated == 0))
```

## Filter to balanced-ish panel

```{r filter}
# Keep newspapers with at least 12 months of observations
np_counts <- panel[, .N, by = newspaper_name]
keep_nps <- np_counts[N >= 12, newspaper_name]
panel <- panel[newspaper_name %in% keep_nps]

# Keep newspaper-months with at least 5 articles
panel <- panel[n_articles_non_coughlin >= 5]

message("\nFiltered panel:")
message("  Newspapers: ", uniqueN(panel$newspaper_name))
message("  Newspaper-months: ", nrow(panel))
message("  Treated: ", uniqueN(panel[treated == 1, newspaper_name]), " newspapers, ",
        sum(panel$treated), " newspaper-months")

# Drop helper columns
panel[, c("sustained", "ym_date") := NULL]
```

## Save panel

```{r save}
outpath <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, "did_panel.parquet")
write_parquet(panel, outpath)
message("Saved DiD panel: ", outpath)

# Also save as CSV for inspection
write.csv(panel, file.path(DATA_PANELS, "did_panel.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
message("Saved CSV copy for inspection.")
```

## Panel summary table

```{r summary-table}
library(modelsummary)

# Summary stats by treatment status
panel[, ever_treated := as.integer(!is.na(treat_date))]

summary_by_group <- panel[, .(
  `N newspaper-months` = .N,
  `N newspapers` = uniqueN(newspaper_name),
  `Mean incivility (RF)` = round(mean(incivil_rate_rf, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  `Mean incivility (lexicon)` = round(mean(incivil_rate_lexicon, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  `Mean Coughlin count` = round(mean(coughlin_count), 2),
  `Mean articles/month` = round(mean(n_articles), 1),
  `Mean OCR quality` = round(mean(mean_ocr, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
), by = .(Group = fifelse(ever_treated == 1, "Treated", "Never Treated"))]

tex <- knitr::kable(summary_by_group, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE,
                    caption = "Summary Statistics by Treatment Group")
save_table(tex, "summary_statistics")
message("Saved summary statistics table.")
```
